subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-10-02
subcodes.first_line: We aspire to find true human beings in this world. Man becomes human only through spiritual life, and the foundation of such a life is made up of heavenly perfections.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما در دنیا عقب انسان می گردیم انسان بحیات روحانی انسانست و سبب این حیات کمالات معنوی و صفات رحمانی است
subcodes.subjects: @man's distinction from the animal, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @purpose; goal of creation, @attaining the life of the spirit
